name: Jacob
bio:
As a member of the Werewolf Clan, Grayson is famous in the Vampire Castle for his great strength and exquisite martial arts. He was once Alucard's protector and combat coach, teaching him to dare to try and not be trapped by immediate difficulties.

Role: Physical Counterattack
Specialty: A powerful warrior whose Ultimate has high lifesteal; has high Evasion; triggers AOE Counterattack when Evasion is activated.

skillSlots.name: Acme Fist - Wolf Howl
skillSlots.description: Attacks all enemies for 110% P.DMG, recovering HP equal to 20% of DMG dealt.

skillSlots.name: Mountain-Shattering Fist
skillSlots.description: Attacks enemy with highest Crit for 420% P.DMG, recovering HP equal to 30% of DMG dealt.

effects.name: Power of Moonshade
effects.description: Passive: Replaces Basic Attack with [Acme Fist - Gale].

effects.name: Power of Moonshade
effects.description: After being attacked, releases [Acme Fist - Gale] at attacker (max 2 triggers per turn).

effects.name: Power of Moonshade
effects.description: Gains 2% ATK and DEF per 8% HP lost (max 20%).

effects.name: Power of Moonshade
effects.description: [Acme Fist - Gale] trigger count increased to 4.
